loginFailedDesc: Login failed. Please check your username, password, or captcha and try again.
loginSubtitle: Enter your account details to manage your projects
signUpSubtitle: Make managing your applications simple and organized
registerModeSubtitle: Support username, email, and mobile registration modes. Real backend registration will be connected later.
registerEmailNotImplemented: Email registration is not implemented yet
registerMobileNotImplemented: Mobile registration is not implemented yet
agreeTip: Please agree to the privacy policy and terms of service
passwordStrength: Use 8 or more characters with a mix of letters, numbers, and symbols
forgetPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link
qrcodeSubtitle: Scan the QR code with your phone to log in
qrcodePrompt: Click Confirm after scanning to complete login
codeSubtitle: Enter your mobile number to start managing your project
mobileErrortip: The mobile number format is incorrect
socialBindSubtitle: Your third-party identity has been verified. Choose how to continue.
socialBindRiskTip: After binding, the third-party identity will be linked to a local account. Please confirm the ownership carefully.
socialBindMissingToken: Binding session is missing or expired
registerMockSuccess: Registration page skeleton is ready. Real registration flow will be connected later.
qrcodeFlowSubtitle: Use your mobile app to scan and confirm.
qrcodeFlowPrompt: This page will later connect to the cache-based auth flow store for real-time polling.
qrcodeFlowSubtitleByProvider: Use {0} to complete scanning and confirmation.
qrcodeFlowPromptByProvider: This page will later connect to the {0} QR polling and confirmation flow.
qrcodeFlowDetail: The final implementation will show pending, scanned, waiting for confirmation, confirmed, and expired states here.
loginAgainSubTitle: Your login session has expired. Please log in again to continue.

serverError.badRequest: Invalid request parameters. Please check and try again.
serverError.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
serverError.incorrectAccessToken: Invalid access token. Please sign in again.
serverError.incorrectRefreshToken: Invalid refresh token. Please sign in again.
serverError.internalServerError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
serverError.invalidCaptchaCode: Invalid captcha code. Please try again.
serverError.tokenExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
